data.title: NPG releases publication on US immigration policy failures, urges national conversation on population growth.
data.description: In a recent development, Negative Population Growth, Inc. (NPG) presented a new publication titled "Common Sense Immigration Policy in an Era of Theatrics," emphasizing the pressing need for a national dialogue on population growth. The report highlights flawed strategies and the escalating demand for proactive measures. Released in Alexandria, Virginia, on October 16, 2025, this publication underlines the importance of addressing this issue promptly. Through this release, NPG aims to draw attention to the critical situation and foster informed discussions. It underscores the necessity of reevaluating current policies and implementing effective solutions to mitigate the challenges associated with population growth.

data.title: Iain Twiddy joins Phantom Screens as distributor for Vancouver Island North under Island Screening Systems partnership.
data.description: Island Screening Systems, lead by Iain Twiddy, has partnered with Phantom Screens to become a distributor. The announcement was made in Abbotsford, BC on October 16, 2025. Twiddy will be the regional head for this partnership.

data.title: Disclosure of total voting rights and share capital as of September 30, 2025, in compliance with French Commercial Code and AMF regulations.
data.description: The combined total of voting rights and shares has been disclosed in accordance with article L. 233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the Regulation of the French stock market authority. This information indicates the overall voting rights and shares held by stakeholders within the market.

data.title: Vivakor to offer 8,417,645 shares and 14,689,851 warrants in $5M direct offering on Nasdaq by Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Vivakor, Inc. unveiled a securities purchase agreement with a prominent institutional investor for the acquisition of 8,417,645 shares of its common stock at $0.001 per share, along with 14,689,851 pre-funded warrants at the same price, in a registered direct offering conducted at the market value under Nasdaq rules. The transaction is slated to conclude on October 17, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.

data.title: Lemonade (NYSE: LMND) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025 before market open. Conference call details included.
data.description: Lemonade, Inc. (NYSE: LMND) has scheduled the release of its third quarter 2025 financial results for Wednesday, November 5, 2025, before the market opens. The company will also conduct a conference call on the same day to discuss the results. The conference call is set for 8:00 am Eastern time (5:00 am Pacific time) on November 5, 2025. Participants can join the call by dialing the following numbers: Participant Toll-Free Dial-In Number: +1 833 470 1428, Participant Toll Dial-In Number: +1 646 844 6383. The access code for the call is 547557.

data.title: PopSips spiked prebiotic soda redefining alcohol market; launched late 2024, available in Target stores.
data.description: PopSips, the top spiked prebiotic soda brand, has made waves in the alcohol industry from social media to major retail. Since its late 2024 debut at Target stores, PopSips has gained popularity nationwide. The brand is at the forefront of the better-for-you alcohol trend, offering a refreshing alternative for health-conscious consumers.

data.title: S.T.A.R.T.™ calls for active threat preparedness during National School Bus Safety Week 2025.
data.description: In Chagrin Falls, Ohio, on October 16, 2025, with National School Bus Safety Week approaching (October 20-24, 2025), S.T.A.R.T.™ is urging school districts to broaden their focus on bus safety. They emphasize the importance of incorporating School Transportation Active-Threat Response Training.

data.title: GM Defense & Medal of Honor Foundation partner to boost warfighter readiness and civic inspiration at AUSA.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, GM Defense LLC, a subsidiary of General Motors specializing in cutting-edge defense and government solutions, announced a significant partnership with the Medal of Honor Foundation (MOHF). The collaboration was marked at the Association of the United States event. This partnership signifies a crucial step towards advancing technological capabilities in the defense sector. The collaboration involves cooperation between GM Defense LLC and MOHF to enhance support for military and government customers. The event highlighted the importance of innovative solutions in meeting the evolving challenges faced by defense organizations. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of GM Defense LLC and the noble mission of the Medal of Honor Foundation to provide valuable support for defense initiatives.

data.title: Kentro partners with PFS on $14 billion VA IHT 2.0 contract to transform healthcare for veterans.
data.description: Kentro, based in McLean, Virginia, has announced a partnership with Prometheus Federal Services (PFS) for the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) Integrated Healthcare Transformation 2.0 (IHT 2.0) contract. This 10-year contract is valued at $14 billion and is a multiple-award indefinite delivery, indefinite quantity (IDIQ) agreement. The collaboration aims to support the VA's mission to enhance healthcare services for veterans.
CANADA'S CARNEY SAYS BUDGET TO SHOW HIGHLY COMPETITIVE CORPORATE TAX SYSTEM

data.title: Pharmacies can save employers millions by providing convenient healthcare access, reducing costs. Study in Arlington.
data.description: A recent nationwide study revealed that pharmacy-based care has significantly reduced costs for American employers while meeting the increasing demand from workers for convenient access to healthcare. The study, conducted in Arlington, Virginia, found that by expanding pharmacy services, employers were able to cut healthcare expenses while satisfying employees' desire for improved healthcare access. This finding highlights the effectiveness of pharmacy-based care in addressing both cost concerns and the need for convenient healthcare services. The study was conducted on October 16, 2025, and provides valuable insights into the benefits of incorporating pharmacies into healthcare solutions.

data.title: Service Corporation International (NYSE:SCI) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29, followed by conference call on Oct 30.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Service Corporation International (NYSE: SCI) declared its plans to release financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 29. A conference call led by SCI Management is scheduled for October 30...

data.title: Domino's is partnering with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital for the Thanks and Giving campaign.
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan on October 16, 2025, Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) announced the launch of the St. Jude Giving Combo as part of their support for the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign. Customers have the option to purchase this combo, donate additional funds, or round up their total purchase to contribute to the cause. Domino's has been a longstanding supporter of St. Jude Children's Research, emphasizing their commitment to giving back.

data.title: KBR declares $0.165 quarterly dividend per share to be paid on Jan 15, 2026, to stockholders of record on Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, KBR revealed the declaration of a regular quarterly dividend of $0.165 per share for its common stock with a par value of $0.001 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 15, 2026, to stockholders who are on record as of December 15, 2025.

data.title: S&T Bank President David Antolik wins 2025 C-Suite Award by Pittsburgh Business Times. #Leader #AwardWinner
data.description: In Indiana, Pennsylvania on October 16, 2025, S&T Bank, which is a wholly owned subsidiary of S&T Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA), proudly revealed that David Antolik, the president, has been named a recipient of the 2025 C-Suite award by the Pittsburgh Business Times. The C-Suite Awards highlights outstanding executives in the region for their exemplary performance and leadership qualities.

data.title: TASE to release third quarter 2025 results on Nov 11 after market close. Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd (TASE: TASE).
data.description: Tel Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, with the ticker symbol TASE, has revealed that its financial reports for the period until September 30, 2025, are scheduled to be released on November 11, 2025, post the market closure. Investors can look forward to gaining insights into the company's performance by reviewing these financial statements, which will provide vital information for the specified period. Stay tuned for the detailed financial updates from TASE by mid-November.
